problem id: de91def4
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(7) XOR SHR(5)

examples:
  00011110 -> 00000000
  01101110 -> 00000011
  11111100 -> 00000111
  11110101 -> 10000111
  00110110 -> 00000001
  10101011 -> 10000101
  00110101 -> 10000001
  10001101 -> 10000100

query: 11101001
predicted answer: 10000111
